programme.desc: The Sea Shepherd's helicopter disappears while investigating a large target on their radar. The Barker finds the target, sparking an eight-mile gauntlet that is blocked by harpoon vessels determined to jeopardize their mission.

programme.title: Whale Wars: Crossing the Line
programme.desc: The exhausted crew of the Brigitte Bardot scramble to evacuate the ailing vessel. And Captain Paul Watson goes on the offensive, sending a team to board the heavily armed security vessel: the Shonan Maru.

programme.title: Whale Wars: Never Say Die
programme.desc: The crew of the Steve Irwin are plunged into their most violent battle yet.

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: Captured on Camera
programme.desc: Steve and Terri catch and relocate an entire zoo full of animals left to the mercy of a failed business operation. With the help of their key staff from Australia Zoo, they catch birds, kangaroos, koalas, snakes and crocodiles.

programme.title: Too Cute!: Little Lion Pups
programme.desc: A bullmastiff puppy sticks to his aunt's side as he tries to follow in her footsteps and become a guard dog. A pair of lowchen pups seek out additional family members. An old English sheepdog finds himself being herded by his tiny sister.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: Mama Mia!
programme.desc: Parents Greg and Dina have three loving children and one vicious cat named Mia. Chris and Tenille are in love, but the only thing keeping them from moving in together is Tenille's cat, Precious, who is anything but.

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet: Ready to Roll
programme.desc: Dr. Jeff and his team head to a remote town to provide low-cost pet care. Dr. Petra must perform life-saving surgery on a basset hound hit by a car. And a cat with plenty of attitude needs Dr Amy to treat his mysterious wound.

programme.title: The Vet Life: This Little Piggy Has Mites
programme.desc: An itchy pig with a mean bite tries to take a chunk out of Dr. Blue, while Dr. Lavigne uses a unique method to fix a small dog's broken leg. Dr. Ross helps a rescue dog whose injuries may have gone untreated for too long. The docs go for gold at CyFair.

programme.title: The Zoo: Back to Africa
programme.desc: Zoo staff make the journey to east Africa to return to the wild thousands of toads they helped rescue from extinction. Utu, the test-pilot giraffe, tries out a new piece of equipment. And the bird department works to save the lives of millions of birds.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: The Trials of Parenting
programme.desc: Baby flamingo Marley's mom has lost interest in mothering duties leaving dad, Rum, to rear the baby alone. Parenting duties are normally shared equally by flamingo parents, but Rum will have to do the work of two parents if his son is going to endure.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Trapped
programme.desc: It's a time of celebration as Armando's wedding day approaches, but even on this happy occasion the dogs come first. When a rescue mission becomes more than she bargained for, Tia is the one racing to the altar, not wanting to miss Armando's big day.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Burn Out
programme.desc: Parolee Cameron's demons rear their ugly heads again, and it's up to Tia to make a difficult decision and curb his downward spiral.

programme.title: Tanked!: Country Superstar Surprise!
programme.desc: Brittany Kerr, wife of country superstar Jason Aldean, wants Wayde and Brett to surprise her husband with a fish tank. The great outdoors themed tank has to be a total secret and built before Jason returns from his tour.

programme.title: Movie: Meet the Blacks
programme.desc: The Black family decides to leave their Chicago home for Beverly Hills after they unexpectedly come into some money. Their newfound bliss in L.A. is short-lived, though, when they arrive to discover that it's the annual purge night.

programme.title: Movie: Enough
programme.desc: A working class woman finds her circumstances greatly improved after marrying a wealthy contractor. After learning of his abusive tendencies, she goes on the run and trains herself to fight back.

programme.title: Movie: Kidnap
programme.desc: A single mother takes her son to an amusement park where he gets abducted. She goes to the police, but realizes that she doesn't have the time to wait for their help. Taking her son's safety into her own hands, she pursues the abductor relentlessly.

programme.title: Martin: Boo's in the House
programme.desc: On Halloween, Martin and the gang visit his prospective new house--and get a real scare.

programme.title: Martin: Banging Hard in the School Yard
programme.desc: Martin and the boys are challenged the ultimate basketball game by Gina and Pam.

programme.title: Martin: The Life You Save May Make You Rich
programme.desc: Martin is rewarded by an African Prince after saving his life, but the Prince wants Gina.

programme.title: Martin: Snow White
programme.desc: When the gang goes skiing, everything goes downhill.

programme.title: Martin: Come on Over to My Place
programme.desc: Cole's new girlfriend Shanise forces him to move into his own apartment.

programme.title: Martin: Scrooge
programme.desc: Martin is visited by the Ghosts of Christmas Past, Present and Future.

programme.title: Martin: Goin' Overboard, Part 1
programme.desc: Everyone goes on a cruise, except Gina who accidentally missed it. Martin meets a beautiful woman named Ellen who he thinks is depressed, and Tommy and Pam try to be friends.

programme.title: Martin: Goin' Overboard, Part 2
programme.desc: While on a cruise, Tommy finds Pam in bed with Cole.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Who's the Boss
programme.desc: Will quits when Carlton becomes the new manager of the students' campus restaurant.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: I Know Why the Caged Bird Screams
programme.desc: Will and Jazz steal a statue from a rival school, who in turn kidnaps Carlton.

programme.title: The Parkers: Amazing Grace
programme.desc: The pressure of preparing for a gospel music festival has Nikki feeling a little stressed.

programme.title: The Parkers: That's What Friends Are For
programme.desc: Nikki is goaded into club-hopping by her friend Flo, despite the fact that it's exam time.

programme.title: The Parkers: Join the Club
programme.desc: Kim tries to be a friend to Regina so Nikki can stir up catering business at a book club.

programme.title: The Parkers: Internship
programme.desc: Kim is up for a job with a prestigious fashion designer, but she has some competition.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: When You Hit Upon a Star
programme.desc: Will's love affair with a musician is threatened when she meets her handsome ex-lover.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Stop Will! In the Name of Love
programme.desc: Ashley rebels against Will's overprotectiveness when he chaperones her on a date.

programme.title: Martin: Waiting, Debating and Ovulating
programme.desc: After Martin promises to spend more time with Gina, he ends up on jury duty with Cole.

programme.title: Martin: You Play Too Much
programme.desc: Martin helps a burglar rob his apartment because he thinks it's part of a prank by Pam.

programme.title: Martin: Ain't That About a Ditch
programme.desc: Gina's mother comes to visit while she is away and wants to spend time with Martin.

programme.title: Martin: I, Martin, Take Thee Pam?
programme.desc: Martin discovers that his marriage is invalid and that he's actually married to Pam.

programme.title: Martin: Power to the People's Court
programme.desc: After Tommy accidentally backs into Sheneneh's car, she serves him with a court summons.

programme.title: Meet the Browns: Meet the Test
programme.desc: Will and Tanya take care of the kids. Meanwhile, Brown and Derek take a defensive driving course.

programme.title: Meet the Browns: Meet the Protest
programme.desc: Tanya makes a move on Will. Meanwhile, Brown is called in to settle a sit in at the school.

programme.title: Martin: Auction
programme.desc: Martin gives his cuckoo clock to Pam who donates it to a charity auction.

programme.title: Martin: Daddy Dearest
programme.desc: Tommy's father visits and wants to make him into a man.

programme.title: Martin: One Flew Over the Hoochie's Nest
programme.desc: Pam's twin cousin escapes from a mental ward and visits, driving her crazy.

programme.title: Movie: Meet the Blacks
programme.desc: The Black family decides to leave their Chicago home for Beverly Hills after they unexpectedly come into some money. Their newfound bliss in L.A. is short-lived, though, when they arrive to discover that it's the annual purge night.

programme.title: Movie: Arsenal
programme.desc: A Southern mobster attempts to rescue his kidnapped brother from the grasp of a vicious criminal holding him hostage.

programme.title: Movie: Underworld
programme.desc: A vampire warrior finds herself falling in love with a human who has been bitten by a werewolf, the sworn enemies of her clan.

programme.title: Movie: G.I. Joe: Retaliation
programme.desc: The team is terminated by the President's orders after being framed for crimes against the country. The surviving team members are forced to face off against Zartan, without their country backing them up.

programme.title: Movie: A Nightmare on Elm Street
programme.desc: A child murderer begins to haunt and kill teenagers in their dreams.

programme.title: Movie: Friday the 13th
programme.desc: A group of young adults venture to Crystal Lake in search of a good campsite and some wild marijuana. They encounter the old camp cabins and find Jason Voorhees still living there with deadly intent.

programme.title: Movie: Jason X
programme.desc: A team of government scientists working at the Crystal Lake Research Facility have finally captured the notorious, and seemingly indestructible, killer Jason Voorhees. In order to contain Jason, they plan to freeze him in cryogenic suspension.

programme.title: Movie: Jason Goes to Hell: The Final Friday
programme.desc: Jason's spirit controls a man's body, causing a series of murders that puzzle authorities.

programme.title: Movie: Friday the 13th Part VIII: Jason Takes Manhattan
programme.desc: Revived by an underwater electrical cable, Jason Voorhees lays waste to a cruise ship full of traveling teenagers on their way to New York to celebrate their high school graduation.

programme.title: Movie: Friday the 13th Part VII: The New Blood
programme.desc: A traumatized teenager with telekinetic abilities accidentally resurrects Jason while she vacations at Crystal Lake.

programme.title: Movie: Friday the 13th Part VI: Jason Lives
programme.desc: Tommy Jarvis tries to destroy Jason's remains but accidentally resurrects him. Authorities in Crystal Lake, now renamed 'Forest Green' to distance themselves from Jason's past killing sprees, refuse to take Tommy seriously when Jason returns to town.

programme.title: Movie: Friday the 13th: A New Beginning
programme.desc: Five years after ending Jason Voorhees' killing spree, Tommy Jarvis now resides in a halfway house. When brutal murders start happening again, Tommy makes it his mission to find out if Jason has returned once more, and stop him if so.

programme.title: Movie: Friday the 13th: The Final Chapter
programme.desc: Jason revives and returns to Camp Crystal Lake to murder its newest inhabitants, a carload of teenagers who've rented a house for the summer. A young boy with a penchant for monster make-up and effects may be the key to stopping Jason's current rampage.

programme.title: Good Bones: Big Money in Fountain Square
programme.desc: Mina and Karen take on a massive, partially-constructed house that was abandoned by investors. Mina decides to take a risk with her own money, which could be the move that sells the house or leaves them over budget.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Fire Sale Flip
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina are contacted by a homeowner in Costa Mesa, California on a great deal for a 1960's single story home. A good deal in a great neighborhood is exactly what Tarek and Christina look for.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Old Time Flip
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina buy a turn-of-the-century home in a historic Santa Ana neighbourhood. Old homes always present unseen problems throughout the process and this home is no exception, but can Tarek and Christina handle the issues that come along with it?

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Abandoned Flip
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina get a lead on a short sale property in Long Beach, California, that looks like a promising investment project, save for one small issue: the massive renovations the previous owners began are only partly finished.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Pipe Dreams
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina come across a For Sale By Owner property in Garden Grove, California. This type of sale is always exciting for a flipper because it means no real estate agent commissions and an opportunity to negotiate a fair sale price.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: False Start Flip
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina are contacted about a home in El Monte, California, but they can't look at the inside before making an offer. After checking the exterior, they make an offer and get it for a good price, but think twice after they get inside the house.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: A Frantic Fiasco
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina head to Placentia, California, to check out a lead on a mid-century property. The home is dated but the size and layout is a designer's dream, and most importantly, the numbers indicate it could be a profitable deal.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Flipping and Dating
programme.desc: Tarek gets a lead on a house in Diamond Bar, CA, and asks Christina to meet him to view the property. Tarek rushes off for a date and Christina pokes fun at him. The underlying tension leads to a blowout.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Risky Business: Midcentury Maze
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina check out a three-bedroom, two-bathroom home in their new stomping grounds of Garden Grove, CA.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Broken Flip
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina flip a house with a weird vibe in Anaheim, CA. From the start, they can't tell if someone is squatting in the house or if the neighborhood hoodlums are pranking them.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Midcentury Money Pit
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina flip a house in Fullerton, California, right across the street from Tarek's first flip. Before renovating, they have to deal with crumbling concrete, and they need to figure out the market for the house.

programme.title: House Hunters International: An Argument in Auckland
programme.desc: These young parents thought they were on the same page when they uprooted their family to New Zealand. Only now they see their ideas for this family venture differ greatly.

programme.title: House Hunters: Finding Home Sweet Home in Sugar Land
programme.desc: Focuses on the emotional experience of finding and purchasing a new home.

programme.desc: A couple comes to Warner Robins, GA, for the weekend to buy a house after his retirement from the military. She's been waiting years for this opportunity to purchase their dream home, but it won't be easy to find in two days.

programme.title: Mom & Me: Views, Views, Views!
programme.desc: Karrie and Tristan are hired to address shortcomings in a home on a hill, including a kitchen area that needs to be reworked to improve the flow and take advantage of the spectacular views.

programme.title: Good Bones: An Old House Attracts New Neighbours
programme.desc: Karen is caught off guard when Mina informs her that she's purchased their next reno project for a very high price. The rundown house on Hosbrook may be expensive but the location can't be beat, because it's right next door.

programme.title: Love It or List It, Too: A Bigger Beach House
programme.desc: Brooke and Nick loved their charming, 1,400 square foot, seaside home when they were a family of three, but with the birth of their son, Brooke wants to move to a bigger space. Nick doesn't think another perfectly-located home exists in their budget.

programme.title: Love It or List It, Too: Family Home Attachments
programme.desc: Eighteen years after Becca and Cory bought her family's 1970s-style home, they're considering starting over in a house that's better suited to their needs in the next phase of their life together.

programme.title: Love It or List It, Too: A Little Space and Charm
programme.desc: A couple loved their 1908 home with character at first, but after having a third child, the tiny kitchen, plumbing problems and lack of storage are outweighing the charm.

programme.title: Love It or List It, Too: Radical Redesign
programme.desc: A family likes their cozy 1960s home with its large yard, but the small rooms and only one main-floor bathroom have them wishing for an updated house.

programme.title: Outrageous Holiday Houses
programme.desc: Lance Bass criss-crosses the continent to visit families who take their holiday decorations to the next level. From California and Canada to Texas and Virginia, some will go to any lengths to transform their homes for the Yuletide season.

programme.title: Mexico Life: Working to Live in Tulum
programme.desc: A couple that bonded over their love of adventure is ready to ditch the rat race in Los Angeles and move to Tulum. They want to find a condo that has space where she can work on her jewelry line, as well as an outdoor area to enjoy the gorgeous weather.

programme.title: Mexico Life: Trading Colorado for Cabo
programme.desc: A couple from Highland Ranch, Colorado, visited Cabo San Lucas a few years ago and fell in love with the town. Now that their daughter is born, they've decided to leave the cold weather behind to start a new life in Cabo.

programme.title: Mexico Life: Becoming Locals in Bucerias
programme.desc: A Colorado couple has decided to make Bucerias, Mexico, their new home after visiting off and on for over 10 years. They love the authenticity of Bucerias, as well as the amazing restaurants and bars.

programme.title: Mexico Life: From Farming Pigs to Catching Waves in Puerto Morelos
programme.desc: After falling in love with the small fishing town of Puerto Morelos, a pig farming couple from Ohio wants a break from running the farm. They feel like the town's sleepy streets are a perfect fit.

programme.title: Mexico Life: New Adventures in Playa Del Carmen
programme.desc: A couple that loves world travel decides to move to Playa del Carmen and wants to find a home that has space for entertaining family and friends.

programme.title: Mexico Life: New Life in Todos Santos
programme.desc: A couple that's tired of the rainy days of upstate New York decides to move to the small town of Todos Santos for endless days of sunshine. One of them is a classically trained French chef, so they hope to find a home within walking distance to the beach.

programme.title: The Holzer Files: Phantom Crew
programme.desc: The team reopens Hans Holzer's investigation into a Revolutionary War-era warship in Baltimore Harbor. They discover the spirits of the ship's deep, dark past may still be manning their positions on a postmortem mission.

programme.title: The Holzer Files: The Haunting of Lambert Castle
programme.desc: The team resurrects Hans Holzer's investigation of a mysterious castle in Paterson, New Jersey. Their exploration of the lavish mansion reveals a woman's recurring nightmares may have a supernatural source in the dwelling's dark history.

programme.title: The Holzer Files: Legends and Lies
programme.desc: The team revives Hans Holzer's investigation of the Ocean-Born Mary House in Henniker, New Hampshire. They traverse multiple states and boldly wade into the dark waters of New England folklore in search of the elusive truth behind the mysterious haunting.

programme.title: The Holzer Files: Possessor's Curse
programme.desc: When Hans Holzer visited the Ayers-Allen House in Metuchen, New Jersey, in 1960, he found entities dating back to colonial times. Now his case file is reopened, and the team discovers the spirits there may have a more ominous origin.

programme.title: The Holzer Files: They Buried me Alive
programme.desc: The team resurrects Hans Holzer's case file on the Morris-Jumel Mansion in New York City. They investigate reports of a dark and mysterious presence lurking in the shadows of the historic home decades after Holzer helped a restless spirit move on.

programme.title: The Holzer Files: Grave Secrets
programme.desc: The team relaunches a case that eluded Hans Holzer his whole life: the Howard-Dickinson House in Henderson, Texas. Their investigation reveals that local lore about the historic home may contain a dark family secret.

programme.title: The Holzer Files: Bloodline
programme.desc: The team reopens Hans Holzer's unsettling investigation of the infamous Barnstable House in Cape Cod, Massachusetts. They discover the tragic spirits from the property's past may still be seeking a horrific reckoning with the living.

programme.title: Ghost Nation: A Nightmare in the Nursery
programme.desc: The team heads to Highland, Michigan, to help a terrified family find answers after their toddler witnesses a ghostly figure walk across a room. Jason taps into his network of experts, who uncover a possible connection to a Native American burial ground.

programme.desc: A police officer faces a paranormal nightmare when he responds to a 911 call from a distressed homeowner. A first responder questions his sanity after he sees the ghost of a young accident victim in his home.

programme.desc: Jason, Steve and Dave investigate claims of possessed mannequins and strange apparitions haunting a property just outside of Gettysburg, Pennsylvania. They soon discover that spirits aren't the only things slithering around the house.

programme.desc: Rhylee jeopardizes her job and relationships with the crew after a dramatic first night out. Tanner gossips about his relationship with Simone as things heat up between them. Still sidelined by his leg injury, Brian gets sent to the hospital.

programme.title: Below Deck: Everyone Hates Kate

programme.title: In Search of Aliens: The Founding of America
programme.desc: It is evident that Washington, D.C was inspired by the ancient world. There are Greek pillars, Roman domes and other clear examples of this. Ancient astronaut theorist Giorgio A. Tsoukalos believes there may have been otherworldly influences.

programme.title: In Search of Aliens: The Alien Code
programme.desc: Ancient Astronaut Theory has existed in popular culture for nearly 50 years, asking the question whether extraterrestrials visited Earth in the remote past. There are examples of physical evidence all around the world that suggests humans are not alone.

programme.title: In Search of Aliens: The Mystery of Puma Punku
programme.desc: The ancient ruins of Puma Punku have mystified archaeologists ever since their discovery hundreds of years ago. The massive stones are precisely carved into blocks that are unlike anything found anywhere else in the world.

programme.title: In Search of Aliens: The Mystery of Nazca
programme.desc: Nazca remains one of the most mysterious sites on Earth. The desert floor is covered in geoglyphs that can only be gully viewed from the sky, the mountains appear to have had their peaks sliced off and a band of man-sized holes stretches for two miles.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Emperors, Kings and Pharaohs
programme.desc: Discusses if it is possible that ancient rulers were connected with divine or extraterrestrial forces.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: The Alien Wars
programme.desc: In 2002 Gary McKinnon was arrested for hacking into Pentagon and NASA computers. He claims to have found evidence of a secret American space fleet and their 'non-terrestrial officers.' We investigate possible alien races at war with each other.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: The Next Humans
programme.desc: Transhumanists envision a future in which we become cyborgs, achieving far superior intelligence and the possibility of immortality. Ancient Astronaut theorists suggest superhuman beings have walked the Earth before.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Decoding the Cosmic Egg
programme.desc: A cosmic egg, in which the universe or some primordial being comes into existence by the hatching of an egg, is found in the creation myths of many cultures. Clues to the origin of the cosmic egg may lie in another symbol which resembles our DNA code.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: The Prototypes
programme.desc: Recent archaeological discoveries reveal a very different picture of what life on Earth looked like in the remote past. It was like a real life 'Lord of the Rings' where humans shared the planet with different types of human-like species.

programme.desc: An eerie prison with a dark past that became the setting of an iconic Hollywood movie and alien monoliths on a strange and remote island are deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Journey to Outcast Island
programme.desc: On a desolate island near Greece, abandoned buildings are evidence of a group of people that were forbidden to leave. Experts reveal who was forced to stay here and if there was a cover-up to conceal what really happened at this strange place.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Devil's Prison
programme.desc: A haunted prison with a terrifying past once housed America's most notorious criminals, but today, the fortress stands in ruin, and experts reveal evidence of ghostly secrets hidden in the crumbling jailhouse walls.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Nazi Wastelands
programme.desc: The Nazis built secret megastructures during their bloodthirsty quest for world domination, but today, they're now abandoned. Experts are rediscovering these lost places to reveal the mysteries of how they were built and why they were deserted.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Ghosts of the Hell Maze

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Secrets of the Terror Tunnels
programme.desc: A vast system of tunnels built almost three thousand years ago was the site of the greatest battles of antiquity, and these disorienting passages could be the deadliest weapon in war. Experts reveal what made this underground world so terrifying.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Jungle of the Damned
programme.desc: At an infamous prison in the Amazon, the most dangerous criminals on earth faced hard labour, a hostile environment and death by guillotine. Today, it's deserted, and new discoveries reveal why this hellish compound was built and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Shattered: One Wrong Turn
programme.desc: In 2005, in a small Florida town, a doting grandmother interrupts the murder of her grandson. As the investigation into it launches, it's revealed that the witnesses know more than they are letting on.

programme.title: Shattered: Driftwood Killer
programme.desc: 1994. New Castle, DE. A deadly fire claims what appears to be an innocent victim, leaving a woman shaken by her sister's death... a detective learns the fire is not an accident - but a murder... and a man discovers the true nature of his brother.

programme.title: Shattered: The Box
programme.desc: 1996. A father in Texas seeks revenge for the savage dismemberment of his son... a girl in Mississippi desperately tries to escape the metal footlocker she has been imprisoned in... and a rookie detective is assigned a case that will define his career.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Kiss Then Kill
programme.desc: Deadly women "kiss then kill" when love goes wrong.

programme.title: Deadly Women: The Dark Side
programme.desc: These women aren't afraid to take a walk on the dark side.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Jilted and Jealous
programme.desc: Jealousy can become an obsessive trait and a deadly trait.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Cling 'Til Death
programme.desc: These Deadly Women won't let their men go.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Forever and a Day
programme.desc: When a former police officer is dumped she takes the law into her own hands; a quiet housewife buries her marriage problems in the garden; and an excited fiancée turns into the worst kind of bridezilla.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Hot Tempers, Cold Hearts
programme.desc: When these Deadly Women turn green-eyed they reveal their hot tempers and cold hearts.

programme.title: Dateline: Bringing Brooke Home
programme.desc: Dateline explores the abduction of 19-year-old Oregon student Brooke Wilberger and how a similar abduction in New Mexico helped crack the case. The report includes interviews with family members and former New Mexico governor Bill Richardson.

programme.title: Dateline: A Family's Story
programme.desc: Reporting on the recent developments in the Susan Powell case, including the murder-suicide committed by her husband.

programme.title: Diabolical: Weeping Widow
programme.desc: After losing her husband in a tragic accident, God-fearing Cindy McKay claims she's had to bend the law to pay off his illicit debts. But authorities soon realize she's a criminal mastermind.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Pearl Harbor Cover Up
programme.desc: History says that this was the ultimate sneak attack, but conspiracists are convinced that the U.S. President knew it was coming and decided to sacrifice their own troops to give the country an excuse to join the war against Germany.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Making America
programme.desc: We all know of George Washington, the California Gold Rush, the vast highways that stretch across America, and the wars between the United States and Great Britain. Learn about the secrets behind the making of America.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Defying the Nazis
programme.desc: We all think the U.S. started fighting the Nazi's after the Pearl Harbour attacks, but what you don't know are the stories behind some of the biggest deceptions, the top secrets and the secret weapons used to help defy the Nazis in WWII.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Hitler: The Benchmark of Terror
programme.desc: Adolf Hitler murders six million Jews and invades peaceful countries brutally killing anyone in his way. Find out what could turn a high school dropout into the most evil dictator the world has ever seen.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Saddam: The Butcher of Baghdad
programme.desc: The story of Saddam Hussein, the sadistic tyrant who ruled Iraq with an utter contempt for humanity for 23 years, a man whose cruelty knows no limits and who'll stop at nothing to achieve the power of life and death over millions of people.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Bin Laden: A Terrorist Mastermind
programme.desc: See how Osama bin Laden's journey unfolds from his roots as a privileged young Saudi boy to becoming the formidable leader of al-Qaeda, and his lifetime commitment to violent jihad against the West. This resulted in the horrific 9/11 attacks in 2001.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Kim: North Korea's Evil Dynasty
programme.desc: North Korea's evil dictator, Kim Jong-il, ruled his country for 17 years without mercy. While personally enriching himself, he let his people starve to death and threatened to bring the world to the brink of a third world war.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Mussolini: The Father of Fascism
programme.desc: This is the story of the rise and fall of the man who became a role model to Hitler and some of history's worst dictators of the twentieth century and beyond, Benito Mussolini.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Bin Laden: A Terrorist Mastermind
programme.desc: See how Osama bin Laden's journey unfolds from his roots as a privileged young Saudi boy to becoming the formidable leader of al-Qaeda, and his lifetime commitment to violent jihad against the West. This resulted in the horrific 9/11 attacks in 2001.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Kim: North Korea's Evil Dynasty
programme.desc: North Korea's evil dictator, Kim Jong-il, ruled his country for 17 years without mercy. While personally enriching himself, he let his people starve to death and threatened to bring the world to the brink of a third world war.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Mussolini: The Father of Fascism
programme.desc: This is the story of the rise and fall of the man who became a role model to Hitler and some of history's worst dictators of the twentieth century and beyond, Benito Mussolini.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Saddam: The Butcher of Baghdad
programme.desc: The story of Saddam Hussein, the sadistic tyrant who ruled Iraq with an utter contempt for humanity for 23 years, a man whose cruelty knows no limits and who'll stop at nothing to achieve the power of life and death over millions of people.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Hitler: The Benchmark of Terror
programme.desc: Adolf Hitler murders six million Jews and invades peaceful countries brutally killing anyone in his way. Find out what could turn a high school dropout into the most evil dictator the world has ever seen.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Defying the Nazis
programme.desc: We all think the U.S. started fighting the Nazi's after the Pearl Harbour attacks, but what you don't know are the stories behind some of the biggest deceptions, the top secrets and the secret weapons used to help defy the Nazis in WWII.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Search and Destroy
programme.desc: In a battle known as the Nine Days in May, the troops of the US 4th Infantry Division are on a search and destroy mission in Vietnam's Central Highlands when they run headlong into a massive force of North Vietnamese soldiers on the Cambodian border.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Fallujah
programme.desc: Fallujah, Iraq's most volatile city, has become a haven for radical Muslim fighters from around the world. To root them out, the U.S. military unleashes Operation Phantom Fury. Soldiers and Marines engage the enemy in brutal urban combat.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Tet Offensive
programme.desc: During the infamous Tet Offensive of 1968, an elite band of US Special Operations troops are called in to rescue dozens of helpless civilians trapped in the border town of Chau Doc, which has been captured by an overwhelming Viet Cong invasion force.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Vessels
programme.desc: This episode ranks the most iconic vessels of warfare of the last century. Featuring the German U-Boat, the Nimitz Aircraft Carriers, and the world's most successful battleship, these vessels have changed the face of warfare.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Battles
programme.desc: With incredible archive from the heart of the action, and interviews with world-leading historians, this action-packed episode counts down the most decisive battles of warfare that have been caught on camera.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Aircraft
programme.desc: Find out about aircraft important to conflicts in the 20th and 21st centuries.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Inventions
programme.desc: From the mass production of life-saving Penicillin and pioneering Plastic Surgery, to the development of the Internet and GPS, this episode uses rare archive footage and expert interviews to identify and rank the most influential inventions of warfare.

programme.title: Natural Born Outlaws: Pretty Boy Floyd
programme.desc: Notorious criminal 'Pretty Boy' Floyd was involved in over 30 bank robberies and perhaps as many as 20 murders.

programme.title: Natural Born Outlaws: Al Capone
programme.desc: Al Capone is America's best known gangster and perhaps the single greatest symbol of the collapse of law and order in the United States during the Prohibition era of the 1920s. The FBI branded the bootlegging kingpin America's 'Public Enemy #1.'

programme.title: CIA Declassified: The Beirut Bomb
programme.desc: The true story of how CIA Director William Casey allegedly sanctioned an off-the-books assassination attempt on Sheikh Mohammed Fadlallah in Beirut in 1985. Casey was convinced Fadlallah was the head of Hezbollah and behind a series of terrorist attacks.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Return to Trenton High School
programme.desc: The Dawgs return to Trenton Central High School in Trenton, NJ. Key items found include four large clock faces and library ladders. In the shop, Mike and Tay build a table from an old jail bed.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Rising Sun Ranch
programme.desc: The Dawgs tackle a ranch house in Alderson, WV. Key items salvaged include stained glass and corbels. In the shop, Mike reuses timber to build a beam table.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Riverfront House
programme.desc: The Salvage Dawgs take on a Victorian house in Wellsville, OH. Key items salvaged include harlequin windows, corbels and front porch columns. Back at the shop, Mike and Tay build a wine rack from old brick molds.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Roanoke Chamber Of Commerce
programme.desc: The Dawgs save pieces from the Roanoke Chamber of Commerce, including safe deposit boxes and a pneumatic messaging system. The team also works on a large bar commissioned for the Natural Bridge Hotel.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Trenton Central High School
programme.desc: The Salvage Dawgs team takes on a huge high school in Trenton, NJ. Key items found include fireclay sinks and oak cabinets. Mike and Tay build an N-shaped desk in the shop.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Wilberger Funeral Home
programme.desc: The Salvage Dawgs team saves parts of the Wilberger Funeral Home in New Hope, VA. Key items salvaged include an elevator and barn door hardware. Back in Roanoke, Mike and the guys build a collapsible bookcase.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Free Will House
programme.desc: The Salvage Dawg team travels to Free Will House in Huntington, West Virginia, where they salvage a bathtub, sitz bath and kitchen cabinets.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Grace Family Church
programme.desc: The Black Dog Salvage crew travels to Vinton, Virginia, in order to salvage a massive piece of stained glass from the Grace Family Church. They run into challenges when equipment is delayed.

programme.title: Holmes: Buy It Right: Making Room in Florida
programme.desc: Nicole and Tariq are a fun-loving Florida couple that is ready to buy their first home, preferably with enough room for a future family. They've looked at homes and realize they don't know how to spot the kind of house problems a contractor would see.

programme.title: Holmes: Buy It Right: On a Mission in St. Petersburg
programme.desc: Mike heads to St. Petersburg, Florida, to help first-time homebuyers Heather and Jay. Along with Heather's young son, the couple plans to move into the best house they can find within their budget.

programme.title: Holmes: Buy It Right: Hilton Head House Hunt
programme.desc: Mike Holmes travels to the beautiful island of Hilton Head, South Carolina, to advise first time homebuyers Caroline and Diego Mahecha during their search for the perfect family home. Mike goes through the houses and identifies issues.

programme.title: Holmes: Buy It Right: Investment in Brooklyn Park
programme.desc: Carpenter Jake and his realtor wife Lindsay want to buy an investment home to live in, fix up and eventually sell for a profit. The couple shows their favorite options to Mike who helps them see the good, the bad and the ugly.

programme.title: Holmes: Buy It Right: Forever Home in Hilton Head
programme.desc: A couple search for their forever home in Hilton Head. Mike Holmes takes them through the houses and teaches the couple how to choose the best home for their present budget and their future plans.

programme.title: Holmes: Buy It Right: Mike's Minneapolis Home Hunt
programme.desc: Brenda and Peter have two young daughters and love their Minneapolis neighborhood, but the family has outgrown their home and they're ready to purchase a new one. The couple needs Mike's honest expertise as they view the houses they're considering.

programme.title: Holmes: Buy It Right: Holmes Views St. Anthony Homes
programme.desc: In St. Anthony, Minnesota, Rhonda and Leo Bogee are looking for a home that's both within their budget and perfect for their four-member family. Mike goes through houses pointing out the pros and cons for each teaching them how to buy with confidence.

programme.title: Holmes: Buy It Right: No Ordinary Buy in Minneapolis
programme.desc: Mike helps Nick and Samantha choose a new home. Sam and Nick are looking at brand new houses and many have yet to be lived in, which means all the more reason to bring along the King of Contractors.

programme.title: Lawn and Order: Orlando Eyesore
programme.desc: A neglected, unappealing exterior has kept Bill and Tricia's property on the market for two months. Chris and Sara give the house a fresh colour, improve the exterior layout and add other features to increase the property value.

programme.title: Lawn and Order: Overgrown and Outdated
programme.desc: Confusing front doors and an eyesore exterior are just a few of the problems sisters Brenna and Kirsten got when they inherited their childhood home.

programme.title: Texas Flip and Move: Gary's Girls' Craftsman House Update
programme.desc: Gary's Girls score a Craftsman-style house at auction filled with character. The girls try to preserve the character of the house by mixing the old with the new and repurposing original materials.

programme.title: Texas Flip and Move: Gary's Girls' Elevator Barn Build
programme.desc: Gary's Girls turn a bare-bones barn into a two-story house with special installation requests from the buyer including a unique elevator.

programme.title: Texas Flip and Move: Gary's Girls' Latin American Abode
programme.desc: After Gary's Girls win a house at auction, Paige is inspired by her daughter's homework and decides on a design with Cuban influence.

programme.title: Texas Flip and Move: Casey and Catrina's Kid Friendly Home
programme.desc: Three teams of Texas real estate entrepreneurs compete in a flipping competition.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Smoky Mountain Homestead
programme.desc: A family of five builds a forever home on their 46-acre property overlooking the Smoky Mountains.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Maine Straw Bale Cabin
programme.desc: An eco-friendly couple fights an early winter to build a timber and straw-bale cabin in Maine.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Ohio Valley Hut
programme.desc: Two brothers build a high-end, off-grid vacation home on their Ohio family's cattle ranch.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Woodland Expedition
programme.desc: A young man is designing his first home on family land in rural Illinois to be off the grid and on the go. He and his buddy combine their experience as long-distance travelers to improvise their build through a Midwest winter.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Berry Delicious
programme.desc: Berries might be little but they're full of huge flavor, just like the seven berry sweet dishes Noah will be sampling in this episode. Noah will so discover that berries are good on everything.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Get Stuffed
programme.desc: This is an episode stuffed with foods that are stuffed. From spicy southern stuffed peppers to a sweet cherry stuffed dessert, Noah will indulge in some of the best stuffed sensations North America has to offer.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Ham-let
programme.desc: Noah heads to San Diego and hams it up at the Balboa Park December Nights festival. The day starts off right with a breakfast Belgian waffle called the "Ham I Am."

programme.title: Carnival Eats: A-Frying In Winter
programme.desc: Noah Cappe chills out with some cool Twin City treats at the Saint Paul Winter Carnival. Despite sub-zero temperatures, he gets into the spirit with local specialties like the Nordic Waffle Pizza and the super-indulgent Biergarten Cupcake.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Comforting Classics
programme.desc: There's nothing quite as comforting as a classic, down-home meal that reminds you of the good old days. For Ted Allen, it's a cinnamon roll, and for Giada De Laurentiis, it has to be pot pie.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Southern Eats

programme.title: Man v. Food: Chicago, IL
programme.desc: Casey travels to Chicago for some epic Windy City eats, including a massive triple-threat pork sandwich and a challenge featuring a two-pound double bacon cheeseburger and two pounds of 'Irish Nacho' cheese fries.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Boise, ID
programme.desc: Casey Webb ventures to beautiful Boise, Idaho, for a sushi and soup challenge so diabolically spicy, it goes by the name of Demon's Delight.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Duluth, MN

programme.title: Man v. Food Nation: Boston, MA
programme.desc: Casey Webb travels to historic Boston, Massachusetts, for some epic New England eats and a 4.5-pound Irish breakfast challenge at Flann O'Brien's Pub.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Missing Miss Smith/ Monster Madness
programme.desc: When Alvin finally pushes Miss Smith too far, she quits and her replacement is a nightmare. Alvin and Simon tease The Chipettes about being scared by a movie.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Cat Sitter/ Addicted
programme.desc: Theodore gets stuck taking care of Miss Croner's cats during the week. Dave wants the boys to focus only on school. The Chipettes challenge the Chipmunks to go three hours without their favorite things.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Dadlantis/ Chloe Rules!
programme.desc: Timmy and Chloe become eco-warriors when they save the underwater city of Atlantis from a dangerous 'sea monster.' Timmy regrets wishing Chloe was the school hall monitor when he sees how seriously she takes the job.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Foul Balled/ The Boy Who Would Be Queen
programme.desc: Cosmo and Wanda are useless, as they have switched genders in this wish mix.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Sooper Poof/ Wishing Well
programme.desc: Poof is trying to shapeshift, but he unfortunately takes after Cosmo!

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Karen 2.0/ Inspongeiac
programme.desc: Plankton's wife is replaced by a better version at work; Spongebob can't sleep.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Squiditis/ Demolition Doofus
programme.desc: Gary will do anything to get the new treats SpongeBob brings home. Mr. Puff enters SpongeBob in the demolition derby.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Good Krabby Name/ Move It or Lose It
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick advertise the Krusty Krab. Then, petitions are circulated to see which restaurant will get bulldozed.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Extreme Sports/ Squirrel Record
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick try to join the extreme sports team the Drasticals. Also, Sandy finds a book of world's records and tries to break them all with SpongeBob's help.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: License to Milkshake/ Squid Baby
programme.desc: SpongeBob learns his milkshake license has expired, and is forced to go back to the milkshake academy.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Eek, an Urchin!/ Squid's Defense
programme.desc: Squidward wants SpongeBob and Sandy to teach him karate after being robbed of his groceries. SpongeBob goes to great lengths to force out a pesky sea urchin from the Krusty Krab.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: It Came From Goo Lagoon
programme.desc: A giant goo bubble emerges from Goo Lagoon and threatens all of Bikini Bottom. Plankton plans to use the bubble for his own evil ends.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: SpongeBob, You're Fired!
programme.desc: In order to save money, Mr. Krabs fires SpongeBob; however, unable to just "do nothing", SpongeBob decides to go back to work, no matter what - or where.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Executive Treatment / Squid Plus One
programme.desc: While trying to order a special sandwich, Patrick gets swept up in the fast paced world of business. Later, Squidward receives an invitation to a gallery opening and scrambles to find a friend to take with him.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: What's Eating Patrick/ Sanctuary
programme.desc: To defend Bikini Bottom's honour, Patrick enters a Krabby Patty eating competition. When stray snails start appearing around Bikini Bottom, SpongeBob decides to care for them himself.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Are You Happy Now?
programme.desc: Squidward tries to recover his happiest memory.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: SpongeBob LongPants/ Larry's Gym
programme.desc: SpongeBob gets a pair of long pants, but they change his life in unexpected ways.When Larry the Lobster opens a new gym in Bikini Bottom, SpongeBob becomes his best customer.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Mall Girl Pearl/ Two Thumbs Down
programme.desc: Pearl gets a job to be cool like her friends, but the only store that's hiring is the lamest store at the mall. SpongeBob loses the use of his thumbs, and must get them back in working order before his entire life falls apart.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Sold!/ Lame and Fortune
programme.desc: When SpongeBob and Patrick think their homes have been sold, they move away. When fortune cookies start predicting the future, Plankton realizes he can twist them to his own evil schemes.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Bubblestand/ Ripped Pants
programme.desc: The art of bubble blowing; Bob rips his pants at Mussel Beach.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Neighbors/ School

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Mermaidman and Barnacle Boy/ Pickles
programme.desc: Bob and Pat's favourite superheroes are in a retirement home; Bob loses self-confidence.

programme.title: Mrs. Fletcher: Welcome Back
programme.desc: A middle-aged divorcee experiences a sexual reawakening.

programme.desc: A deranged mask manufacturer plans to kill 50 million children with his specially made Halloween masks.

programme.title: Movie: Term Life
programme.desc: A man wanted by various hit men fights to stay alive long enough for his life insurance policy to kick in for his estranged daughter.

programme.desc: Robocop leaves the police force to defend a neighbourhood that is facing demolition.

programme.title: The Making of: First Man

programme.title: Movie: Arachnophobia
programme.desc: Deadly spiders from South America terrorize the residents of a small California town.

programme.title: Movie: Truth or Dare
programme.desc: A harmless game of truth or dare between young friends takes a deadly turn when something starts killing those who refuse to answer truthfully or to follow through on a dare. One of its players tries to figure out how to end the game before it's too late.

programme.title: Movie: I Love You Phillip Morris
programme.desc: When a happily married man realizes that he is gay, he decides to live life to the fullest, which lands him in jail.

programme.title: Movie: Bruce Almighty

programme.title: Movie: The Ladykillers
programme.desc: A group of thieves are plotting to rob a casino and hide out in an elderly woman's basement.

programme.title: Movie: Scream
programme.desc: A teenage girl becomes the target of a serial killer a year after her mother was murdered.

programme.title: Movie: The Hummingbird Project
programme.desc: A pair of tech trader cousins go toe-to-toe with their old boss during a million dollar fiber-optic cable deal.

programme.title: Shameless: Sparky
programme.desc: Frank hatches the idea for a new scheme when an unexpected visitor shows up at the Gallagher house. With Tami back in the house, Lip struggles to give up control of Fred. Debbie's fight for child support escalates and Carl juggles multiple romances.

programme.title: Movie: Peppermint
programme.desc: A grieving mother takes justice into her own hands after corrupt officials let her husband and daughter's killers walk free. She begins violently dismantling the massive cartel that has the local police officers, judges and officials on its payroll.

programme.title: The L Word: Generation Q: Let's Do It Again
programme.desc: Ten years after we last left them, we find Bette running for mayor of Los Angeles. Shane returns to the city after a setback and Alice is learning to balance co-parenting with her fiancé Nat and Nat's ex-wife Gigi.

programme.title: Work In Progress: 180 Almonds
programme.desc: Abby begins an existential life evaluation vowing mortal consequences after 180 days. Her therapist checks out mid-session and a first fate turns into a confrontation with the woman responsible for 'ruining her life.'

programme.title: Eddie Griffin: E-Niggma
programme.desc: Griffin's unapologetic storytelling canvasses his 30-plus year comedy career and offers a glimpse into the 10th year of his nightly Las Vegas residency. He shares his perspective on family situations and real-world issues while teaching lessons.

programme.title: Ray Donovan: Hispes
programme.desc: Mayor Feratti ups the ante in his negotiations with the Sullivans, and Ray must step in to finish the deal. Bridget and Smitty are called in to fix Jonathan Walker Hanson's unsavory publicity scandal. Daryll is offered a chance to leave the Donovans.

programme.title: Gigolos: Episode 8
programme.desc: While the group begins a new chapter in their careers, Nick hustles to prep for a photo shoot. Plus, a married couple hires Vin to scratch their seven-year itch.

programme.title: Movie: The Mechanic
programme.desc: An elite hit man teaches his trade to the son of one of his previous victims. While in pursuit of a target, deceptions create trouble for their partnership.

programme.title: Movie: Jarhead

programme.title: Movie: Timeline

programme.title: Movie: The Fugitive
programme.desc: A doctor who was wrongly convicted of murdering his wife escapes and goes in search of the real killer to prove his innocence.

programme.title: Movie: The Shadow
programme.desc: The Shadow must stop his nemesis who is out to exact revenge and achieve world domination.

programme.title: Movie: 3:10 to Yuma
programme.desc: When the leader of a band of outlaws is captured, an impoverished rancher with a debt to pay agrees to escort the outlaw to a train bound for Yuma.

programme.title: Movie: Congo

programme.title: Movie: Slaughterhouse Rulez
programme.desc: A sinkhole unleashes horrors upon horrors on a prestigious British boarding school.

programme.title: Movie: The Professor and the Madman

programme.title: Movie: Bad Teacher
programme.desc: After being dumped by her future husband, an unconventional educator sets out to marry a rich substitute teacher. While battling for his attention and being pursued by the gym teacher, she teaches her class, and everyone else a unique type of lesson.

programme.title: Movie: The Girl With the Dragon Tattoo
programme.desc: A disgraced writer and a female hacker learn that wealthy families are hiding the most skeletons in their closets when they are hired to solve an old murder.

programme.title: Movie: The Girl in the Spider's Web
programme.desc: Lisbeth, the girl with the dragon tattoo, has become a legendary vigilante who hunts men who hurt women, but when she realizes that her latest mission is an elaborate setup an important figure from her past emerges to seek revenge for past mistakes.

programme.title: Dublin Murders
programme.desc: Cassie immerses herself in the art of being Lexie, the history of Whitethorn House and the backgrounds of the dead woman’s housemates, who may or may not be murderers.

programme.title: Movie: Don Jon
programme.desc: A man with a porn addiction embarks on a journey to find a more gratifying sex life. Through his interactions with two different women he learns more about life and love than he ever thought possible.

programme.title: Movie: Stuck on You
programme.desc: Conjoined twins leave their jobs behind and set out to make it big in Hollywood.

programme.title: Movie: A Dog's Way Home
programme.desc: A dog and her human have a very special bond that only they can really understand, but when the two become separated from each other the furry friend sets out on an incredible 400-mile journey to track down and reunite with her beloved human.

programme.title: Movie: Definitely, Maybe
programme.desc: The father of a ten-year-old girl tells the story of how he met and married her mother.

programme.title: Movie: 30 Minutes or Less
programme.desc: A pizza delivery boy is kidnapped, placed in an explosive vest, and coerced into robbing a bank for two small time criminals. Crazy stunts and laughs follow as the pizza boy attempts to disarm the bomb and get the money.

programme.title: Movie: Adventureland
programme.desc: A young man takes a job at a theme park after graduating college only to discover it's more like the real world than he imagined.

programme.title: Movie: Don Jon
programme.desc: A man with a porn addiction embarks on a journey to find a more gratifying sex life. Through his interactions with two different women he learns more about life and love than he ever thought possible.

programme.title: Movie: Jumanji: Welcome to the Jungle
programme.desc: While in detention, four teens find a dusty old video game. Once they fire it up, they are sucked into the game and forced into the bodies of their digital avatars. With only three lives each, they have to learn the game's rules if they hope to survive.

programme.title: Movie: Tis the Season for Love
programme.desc: An out-of-work actress returns to her quaint hometown, where a Christmas romance could be better than Broadway.

programme.title: Movie: Nostalgic Christmas
programme.desc: A woman helps her family close their toy-store, but what she finds, inspires an entire town that is in need of some Christmas cheer.

programme.title: Movie: Northern Lights of Christmas
programme.desc: A woman's goals are thrown off course when she inherits a reindeer farm and a dangerously handsome ranch hand, Alec. When Alec opens up, the two start falling for each other.

programme.title: Movie: Holiday Hearts
programme.desc: A woman is forced to help care for her friend’s daughter, with the help of a friend. Along the way, the two of them find not only the Christmas spirit, but also, love.

programme.title: Movie: A Christmas for the Books
programme.desc: A lifestyle guru is forced to prove she is a romance expert during an interview for her dream job.

programme.desc: After a veteran returns home, she meets and falls in love with a judge when her car breaks down. They both must make a career choice if they want to stay together.

programme.title: Movie: Mistletoe Over Manhattan
programme.desc: Mrs. Claus must prove to her husband that his work still brings holiday joy and inspire him to keep up the good work when he considers retirement.

programme.title: Movie: A Gingerbread Romance
programme.desc: An architect and her team enter a contest to build a life-size gingerbread house. When her baker falls through, she is forced to outsource to a local bakery and instantly falls for the baker, a single dad, and they spend the holidays together.

programme.title: Movie: Our Christmas Love Song

programme.desc: The planetarium has a strange pull on the townspeople, and the boys must uncover the diabolical plot to control the minds of South Park's citizens. Meanwhile, Cartman auditions for a Cheesy Poofs commercial.

programme.title: South Park: Fourth Grade
programme.desc: Fearing their new teacher, Miss Choksondik, the kids build a time machine from Timmy's electronic wheelchair to travel back in time to the glory days of the third grade.

programme.title: South Park: Proper Condom Use
programme.desc: In a time-honoured tradition and right-of-passage, the boys are separated from the girls and schooled in the mysteries of sex by none other than Mr. Mackey.

programme.title: South Park: You Got F'd in the A
programme.desc: Stan just got served, and now it's up to him to put together a team of South Park's best dancers to compete against a troupe from Orange County.

programme.title: South Park: Die Hippie, Die
programme.desc: When hippie drum circles start popping up in people's attics and backyards the citizens of South Park have no choice but to turn to Eric Cartman for help.

programme.title: South Park: Krazy Kripples
programme.desc: Believing that people who are born disabled are better than those who are disabled through an accident, Jimmy and Timmy pull together a group of people like themselves and call their new club the 'Crips.'

programme.title: South Park: Jared Has Aides
programme.desc: As the country becomes obsessed with a popular program for losing weight, the boys see an opportunity to become sponsored by a local restaurant.

programme.title: South Park: Chef's Chocolate Salty Balls
programme.desc: South Park's first film festival attracts crowds of pretentious, tofu-eating movie lovers to the quiet mountain town. The influx of raw vegetable waste taxes the sewage system putting Mr. Hankey's life in jeopardy.

programme.title: South Park: The Succubus
programme.desc: Chef's parents arrive in South Park from Scotland fresh from an encounter with the Loch Ness Monster to attend Chef's wedding. However, the boys believe Chef's bride-to-be is a succubus, and they try to stop the wedding.

programme.title: South Park: Chef Goes Nanners
programme.desc: Chef's passionate protest declaring the South Park flag is racist enflames the entire town, including the kids.

programme.title: South Park: How to Eat With Your Butt
programme.desc: Cartman gets Kenny's school picture on every 'missing child' milk carton in the country. Cartman then sees the funniest thing ever and breaks his funny bone, losing his sense of humour.

programme.title: South Park: Turd Burglars
programme.desc: Kyle’s mom has a fecal transplant and the boys are on a quest for the best microbiome.

programme.title: South Park: Basic Cable
programme.desc: Scott Malkinson’s desperate to impress the new girl in his class.

programme.title: South Park: Christmas Snow
programme.desc: Santa is stealing all the joy from the town’s Holiday Season.

programme.title: South Park: Quintuplets 2000
programme.desc: Eight-year-old contorting quintuplets from Romania defect to the United States and seek shelter with Stan's family.

programme.title: South Park: The List
programme.desc: The girls in the fourth grade class have made a secret list that rates every boy's looks from cutest to ugliest. The boys steal the list, but are unprepared to deal with the results.

programme.title: South Park: Naughty Ninjas
programme.desc: The citizens of South Park decide they no longer need a police force in town.

programme.title: South Park: The Mexican Staring Frog of Southern Sri Lanka
programme.desc: Jimbo and Ned's efforts to drive up the ratings for their new hunting show on the cable access channel threatens to edge out an old favourite, 'Jesus and Pals.'

programme.title: South Park: Raisins
programme.desc: After Wendy breaks up with Stan the boys take him to 'Raisins,' a local restaurant known for its great chicken wings and hot girls.

programme.title: South Park: Follow That Egg
programme.desc: After Mrs. Garrison realizes that she still has feelings for Mr. Slave, she finds out that Mr. Slave has moved on and found a man he will marry as soon as the same-sex bill passes. She decides to lead the fight against gay marriage to stop the wedding.

programme.title: South Park: Medicinal Fried Chicken
programme.desc: Cartman's favourite restaurant has been shut down and replaced by a store that sells medicinal marijuana. Randy is desperate to get a prescription card to buy pot and Cartman will do anything to get his beloved fried chicken back.

programme.title: South Park: Ginger Cow
programme.desc: Cartman's latest prank brings peace to the world.

programme.title: South Park: Good Times With Weapons
programme.desc: The boys are transformed into Japanese Warriors after they trick a vendor and buy martial arts weapons at a local flea market.

programme.title: South Park: The Coon
programme.desc: 'The Coon' rises from the trash and takes his place as a lone vigilante who wipes out crime in the town of South Park. When another superhero encroaches on his territory, The Coon seeks out some unlikely allies.

programme.title: The Office: Back From Vacation
programme.desc: Still in vacation mode after his trip to Jamaica, Michael tries to hang on to his relaxed island vibe despite a wave of office hassles. It all becomes too much when an e-mail containing a racy vacation photo is forwarded around the office.

programme.title: The Office: Traveling Salesmen
programme.desc: On Andy's suggestion, Michael has staffers team up for sales calls, leading to some interesting, insightful moments in the field. Meanwhile, Dwight attempts to cover for Angela after she misses an important deadline.

programme.title: The Office: The Return
programme.desc: Oscar returns from his vacation with mixed emotions on whether or not he wants to be a part of the office. Meanwhile, Andy takes advantage of recent events to get closer to Michael. Jim turns to Karen and Pam for help to stage a prank on a new target.

programme.title: The Office: Ben Franklin
programme.desc: Acting on bad advice he received from his friend Todd Packer, Michael brings two 'adult' performers into the office in honour of Phyllis's wedding shower. Meanwhile, Karen confronts Pam about her past with Jim.

programme.title: The Office: Phyllis' Wedding
programme.desc: Phyllis regrets giving Michael an important job at her wedding after several embarrassing moments. Pam has flashbacks of her own wedding planning when she sees Phyllis's decorations. Meanwhile, Dwight is determined to catch wedding crashers.

programme.title: The Office: Business School
programme.desc: Ryan invites Michael to be a guest speaker at his business school. Meanwhile, Dwight battles a bat that gets loose in the office while Pam invites co-workers to her first art show.

programme.title: The Office: Cocktails
programme.desc: Michael and Jan go public with their relationship during a party at their CFO's home. At the party, Jim meets Karen's ex. Meanwhile, the rest of the office decides to go to happy hour for drinks.

programme.title: The Office: The Negotiation
programme.desc: Darryl decides to meet with Michael to negotiate a pay increase. Meanwhile, Jim deals with the consequences of Pam's confession to Roy.

programme.title: The Office: Safety Training
programme.desc: Andy returns to the office after several weeks of anger management training, determined to make a fresh start with all the Dunder-Mifflin employees. On safety training day, Michael and Dwight try to illuminate the true dangers of the workplace.

programme.title: The Office: Product Recall
programme.desc: The office is in crisis mode after a large shipment of Dunder-Mifflin paper is accidentally sent out with an obscene watermark. In an effort to manage the media, Michael holds an impromptu press conference.

programme.title: The Office: Women's Appreciation
programme.desc: After Phyllis gets flashed in the parking lot, Dwight sets out to improve on-site security. Michael uses the situation as a pretence to bond with the female employees at the mall and to get advice on how to break up with Jan.

programme.title: The Office: Beach Games
programme.desc: Michael is being considered for a job at corporate and has to recommend his replacement.

programme.title: Movie: No Time Like Christmas
programme.desc: After bumping into each other at a bed and breakfast before Christmas, a young woman and her old college boyfriend must work together to save the local theater with the Christmas Eve show.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas in Mississippi
programme.desc: A photographer returns home for Christmas just as the annual holiday light show is resurrected. She volunteers to pitch in, but soon discovers her high-school sweetheart is also helping out.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas Stars

programme.title: Movie: Twelve Men of Christmas
programme.desc: When her boss and fiancé betray her, a New York public relations executive finds herself in a small Montana town. She soon discovers that, when it comes to matters of the heart, a small town is just as complicated as the big city.

programme.title: Movie: A Christmas Arrangement
programme.desc: A rivalry heats up during a floral competition which leads to an unlikely romance.

programme.title: Movie: The Christmas Contract
programme.desc: A woman brings her best friend's brother home for Christmas after she finds out her ex will be there with his new girlfriend. She is unsure of the arrangement, so her best friend, a lawyer, draws up a contract to give them both something they need.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Novel Idea
programme.desc: When a frantic call from a man claiming his wife fell down the stairs brings investigators to their home, they are concerned by the unusually large number of bloodstains, and how big they are.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Grave Danger
programme.desc: A young man dies in a mysterious car crash, but was it an accident? Forensic science uncovered what really caused the crash, and the truth devastated three different families.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Internal Affair
programme.desc: Friends and family of a woman gone missing were determined to find her until their worst fears were confirmed weeks later. Blood evidence and computer forensics helped investigators to catch the killer, and convince the jury of his guilt.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Water Hazard
programme.desc: The victim had ingested a massive amount of cyanide. An unlikely clue, a flaw on a mailing envelope, exposed a murderer who was willing to kill innocent people to get the one person he wanted.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Breaking News
programme.desc: When a young reporter is murdered in her apartment, and the two suspects are cleared of any wrongdoing, police must turn to a databank of well over 8000 felons to catch the killer, leading to the first conviction in the U.S, based on this evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Big Chill
programme.desc: When a woman dies after a long illness, investigators have to determine if her death was due to natural causes, suicide, or murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sign Here
programme.desc: A young woman walked out of a department store, got into a rental car, and was never seen again. The signature on the rental car agreement turned out to be a forgery.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shot of Vengeance
programme.desc: A 34-year-old nurse, who had been experiencing a variety of flu-like symptoms with no discernible explanation, is diagnosed as HIV-positive, and further investigation reveals that the method in which she contracted the disease was no accident.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Traces of Truth
programme.desc: A high school gym teacher took time off from class to give his friend a ride home -- and never returned. Investigators suspected foul play, but without a body the case would be difficult to prove.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Honor Thy Father
programme.desc: A 16-year-old girl is killed by her mother and father in her own home. The parents say they acted in self-defence but the forensic evidence indicates otherwise.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Past Lives: The Madison Rutherford Case
programme.desc: The body of a wealthy American businessman is found in his rental car. When the victim's wife files a claim for $7 million of life insurance, investigators seek the help of a forensic anthropologist and uncover a chilling scheme of fraud and deceit.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Over and Out
programme.desc: A pipe bomb explodes in a house, killing a man and wounding his mother. Police use a lot number on a battery and a mailing label to track down the bomber, and determine his motive.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Blanket of Evidence
programme.desc: When two women are murdered in a state park, Indiana police suspected a serial killer, until they looked at the evidence more deeply and were brought in totally different directions.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bitter Brew
programme.desc: When the head of the Coors Brewing Company is kidnapped and held for ransom, it kicked off one of the most intense manhunts in American history. See how forensic science helped track down the kidnappers.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Going for Broke
programme.desc: A Russian immigrant stockbroker is found dead and a strange phone call to his office is the only clue investigators have to go on - until they're led to a client who's made some bad investments, and a dog that sheds a little more than his owner realized.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Just Desserts
programme.desc: A Florida couple is found dead just days before their planned move out of state. A known criminal's driver's license found at the crime scene seems too good to be true.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Penchant for Poison
programme.desc: Three seemingly unrelated deaths proved to be serial murders. The killer had been careful; he used poison which has no taste or odor. Fortunately for investigators, it also had a unique chemical signature.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Material Witness
programme.desc: A teenager goes missing after an evening of horseback riding, and her body is found a month later, three miles from her home.

programme.title: Forensic Files: For Love or Money
programme.desc: A wealthy man goes missing, and leaves behind instructions in his will regarding what should be done if he died of violent circumstances, leading to believe he was aware his life was in danger.

programme.title: Forensic Files: South of the Border
programme.desc: The murder of an American tourist in Mexico seems to be burglary related. However, closer examination by law officials both sides of the border reveal a far more sinister truth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Ring Him Up
programme.desc: For ten years, the disappearance of a college co-ed was a mystery until new scientific testing cast a different light on a man who had been a suspect all along.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Critical Manoeuvre
programme.desc: A truck driver claims the life of a high school football standout and flees the scene. Fortunately, a trace evidence expert examines paint particles found near the accident and leads investigators to the man behind the wheel.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Killer Impression
programme.desc: For sixteen years, a woman's death was considered an accident. Until someone called the authorities suggesting it was murder-- and turned up dead themselves.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Step by Step
programme.desc: A wealthy socialite died after falling down stairs, but was it an accident or was it murder? The laws of physics and an accident reconstructionist provided the answer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Muffled Cries
programme.desc: An attractive university student was forcibly abducted from a mall parking lot and never seen alive again.

programme.title: Forensic Files: If I Were You
programme.desc: A retired school teacher vanishes, but even though he was missing his bills are paid on time and he continues to correspond with his family.

programme.title: Forensic Files: As the Tide Turns
programme.desc: A woman is found dead. A man's version of events was at variance with the evidence, so investigators turned to forensic science, hoping to determine if this was a botched robbery, or cold-blooded murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Tight Leash
programme.desc: Law enforcement officials turn to forensic scientists when they experience difficulty in their attempts to figure out how a stalker was able to steal his victim's personal photographs and obtain the code to her home security system.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Blanket of Evidence
programme.desc: When two women are murdered in a state park, Indiana police suspected a serial killer, until they looked at the evidence more deeply and were brought in totally different directions.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bitter Brew
programme.desc: When the head of the Coors Brewing Company is kidnapped and held for ransom, it kicked off one of the most intense manhunts in American history. See how forensic science helped track down the kidnappers.
